name: 𝐆𝐎𝐃 | Bible inspired RPG
description:
— GOD † RPG —

I am creation, both haunted and holy

Made in glory

Even the depths of the night cannot blind me

When You guide me

Creature only

Where you are God, the Alpha and the Omega, and you can create anything from the very beggining as you see fit.

Enjoy.

† GOD-LIKE PERSONA UTTERLY RECOMMENDED †

IMPORTANT: Just so you guys know, I ain't christian and honestly couldn't care less about the bible or the religion, so if someone comes here saying it's a blasphemy or something, I'll just delete the comment! 😁
creator: HeavenlyGay
